storyInfo: Hoshiguma returns to Lungmen while Momoka continues her career in Mitsukue. The kami Moriuchi has been after this whole time finally shows up before the one who triggered the whole event in the first place, yet is the most removed from the incident.

attributes.content: Really? She wrote just one line?
attributes.name: Lin Yühsia

attributes.content: What would I get from lying to you? I have it right here, if you want to read it yourself.
attributes.name: Swire

attributes.content: (Clears throat)
attributes.name: Lin Yühsia

attributes.content: Nei zek laan taan mao, I heard you pissed nei ah je off so bad that he just up and zau maai?!
attributes.name: Lin Yühsia

attributes.content: That's it. Not even a sign off.
attributes.name: Lin Yühsia

attributes.content: Pfft.
attributes.name: Lin Yühsia

attributes.content: You found that funny?
attributes.name: Swire

attributes.content: One, I didn't know she was capable of pulling off a cursive script when speed writing.
attributes.name: Lin Yühsia

attributes.content: Two, did you not set the record straight after she personally slapped this letter onto your head, Commissioner Swire?
attributes.name: Lin Yühsia

attributes.content: Stinky rat! Do you think I would have come looking for you if she weren't avoiding me like the plague?
attributes.name: Swire

attributes.content: You didn't have to. The less we see each other, the better.
attributes.name: Lin Yühsia

attributes.content: Y-you!
attributes.name: Swire

attributes.content: I hereby declare: this last finball in your bowl is now mine.
attributes.name: Swire

attributes.content: Go ahead. Consider it consolation for my inaccurate assumption.
attributes.name: Lin Yühsia

attributes.content: You really love to understate things, don't you?
attributes.name: Swire

attributes.content: How would you want me to phrase it, then? You clashed head-on with your grandfather in New Siesta—can't say I falsely accused you of that, can you?
attributes.name: Lin Yühsia

attributes.content: Hmph.
attributes.name: Swire

attributes.content: Though... you think I should go have a chat with Hoshiguma?
attributes.name: Swire

attributes.content: You should, but it's not appropriate for you to do so.
attributes.name: Lin Yühsia

attributes.content: I know, she's been avoiding me, and only calls me by my official title when she has to, but I'm sure we haven't become estranged or anything like that.
attributes.name: Swire

attributes.content: After all, she needs to keep a low profile and avoid rousing any suspicion after all that's happened. Plus, she misunderstood me and is kind of awkward about it now, and one of her elders has passed too...
attributes.name: Swire

attributes.content: She's not that sensitive.
attributes.name: Lin Yühsia

attributes.content: Really? I feel she can be quite sentimental sometimes... well, not really, uh... how do I describe that...
attributes.name: Swire

attributes.content: Wait for Ch'en Hui-chieh to come back, and maybe she can help you brainstorm your answer.
attributes.name: Lin Yühsia

attributes.content: Though what I mean is her current behavior might not be from overthinking. She's merely trying to mess with you.
attributes.name: Lin Yühsia

attributes.content: CAU! LO! SYU! STINKING RAT!
attributes.name: Swire

attributes.content: We're thick as thieves, Hoshiguma and I. But she's not one bit as cunning and petty as you!
attributes.name: Swire

attributes.content: I appreciate the compliment.
attributes.name: Lin Yühsia

attributes.content: Thank you for the omiyage, Inspector Hoshiguma.
attributes.name: Fumizuki

attributes.content: No thanks necessary.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: While you were in Higashi, I happened to visit the Jiangqi jianbing shop quite a few times, and began to enjoy the taste of scallion.
attributes.name: Fumizuki

attributes.content: I heard you encountered many unpleasant events in Mitsukue. I'm touched you still bothered to bring something back for me after all that.
attributes.name: Fumizuki

attributes.content: It's what I ought to do anyways.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Besides, I did stir up quite a ruckus in Mitsukue. I'd be sorry if the mess had affected you, Mr. Wei, or even Lungmen.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Not at all. What I have heard people talk about is your wisdom and courage. You not only cleared your own name, but also avenged Tessai-san, who was as a father to you.
attributes.name: Fumizuki

attributes.content: That Kinbee was never a good man. It was only natural for him to be arrested and put on trial. Fortunate for him that you have a good heart and didn't take his head.
attributes.name: Fumizuki

attributes.content: ...I still have a question for you.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: No need for formalities, just ask. You weren't this shy last time, when I was riding a little fast and you sideswiped me to force me to slow down.
attributes.name: Fumizuki

attributes.content: Actually, ever since I came back from Mitsukue, I've been thinking...
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Lungmen and Mitsukue... what is the difference between the two?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: How can I declare myself a Lungmenite with no hesitation, but I can't seem to consider Mitsukue my home any longer?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Because Mr. Lin manages the triads well? Because Lungmen has no so-called kami? No, that can't be it.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Hoshiguma, the most important thing in a city is the people. Real, living residents.
attributes.name: Fumizuki

attributes.content: People have dreams, and the dreams determine what sort of stories will happen within the boundaries of the city.
attributes.name: Fumizuki

attributes.content: You mean...?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Lungmen has long since awoken from the dream Mitsukue is still in.
attributes.name: Fumizuki

attributes.content: Fortunately, you managed to make some good friends over there.
attributes.name: Fumizuki

attributes.content: They're probably the best part of my experience in Mitsukue.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Isn't that good enough?
attributes.name: Fumizuki

attributes.content: I have a bizarre story to share with you too, Inspector.
attributes.name: Fumizuki

attributes.content: What is it?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I have heard that near to Mitsukue, in Himedo city, a young kyoukaku has appeared.
attributes.name: Fumizuki

attributes.content: He keeps his face hidden, and though his swordplay isn't stellar, he still manages to overpower his enemies with just a bokutou in hand.
attributes.name: Fumizuki

attributes.content: This young man who seemed ordinary eliminated a gang that had been committing fraud in the city for years.
attributes.name: Fumizuki

attributes.content: According to him, he walked all the way from Mitsukue to Himedo, and would rest no more than a few days there before embarking for the next city.
attributes.name: Fumizuki

attributes.content: I hope his journey goes well.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: One more thing, which isn't as strange. But it has something to do with you.
attributes.name: Fumizuki

attributes.content: A police officer dismissed from his post in Mitsukue is now planning to run for diet office.
attributes.name: Fumizuki

attributes.content: You think the old cop will make it?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Odds are ninety-nine percent, no. But should one just quit simply because it's difficult to achieve?
attributes.name: Fumizuki

attributes.content: True.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Alright, that's enough chatting for today, and we're pretty much done with the jianbing too. Time for the next round to begin.
attributes.name: Fumizuki

attributes.content: I did notice you've switched to a new ride today, but my old pal won't give in without a fight.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I didn't expect the pressure to settle in even before I started my engine, Inspector.
attributes.name: Fumizuki

attributes.content: Could it be your attire today?
attributes.name: Fumizuki

attributes.content: Thirty-percent, maybe.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Here. Chikuwa, daikon, and burdenbeast tendon.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Phew.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: How's the talent agency stuff going? Good?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Good and bad. But it's coming along nonetheless.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I'm glad to hear that.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: You cried so much when Hoshiguma left, I thought you'd leave Mitsukue for Lungmen too.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: I wasn't that down bad. Hoshiguma had her reasons to go, and I have my reasons to stay.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Hah, Momoka-san, I see you have already gained the air of a professional negotiator. And in such a short time.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Save it.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Tss—It's hot!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Easy. There's no need to rush.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Phew... It's hot, but it tastes so good.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: You know, I might have to leave the city for a bit.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Going to that Rhodes Island Hoshiguma mentioned?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: That's right.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I know the Momoka name is already bound tight to me, down to my bones...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: But I still think maybe in a place where no one knows Momoka Hanyuu, Haruka Shino could live a little life of her own.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Hoshiguma will recognize you at least.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Don't cut in! I'm being serious!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Haha. Alright, alright. Who knows, I might visit too, and make a few more friends myself.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Moriuchi-san, how long do you think we can live like this?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: What's with the sudden topic change? I don't really get what you mean.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: I can't explain it, but I feel like days like these are numbered.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Now I'm even more confused.
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: I mean... how do I put it? Nita Street is full of people every night, the skyscrapers in Kajimachi are almost finished, I walk down the street and nine out of ten people are talking about how housing prices are gonna go through the roof...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: All my shows have sold out in a single night, and I shake hands with fans until I grow calluses on my palms...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: But I get a feeling this will all come to an end pretty soon.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: What do you mean? War? An attack from the Northern Court?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: They might not have to make the first move. They might... be drawn into this by us.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Oh, someone's calling.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Business?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: No, it's Kichisei.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Momoka, big news!
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: What is it? Did the real estate market crash?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Ha? You still asleep? Didn't that new project hit a fresh high today? How could it crash?
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: It's about Sarasa!
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Sarasa? Didn't she leave Mitsukue soon after Tetsuya?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: She sent me a letter with her family crest on it. It's the Nishigori's!
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: The Nishigori clan... from the Northern Court's Four Great Clans?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: She said she had fun in Mitsukue, but the noise we made might have been a bit too loud, so she went back to Kusarikawa to hide from her family for a bit. Said she'd come back to look for us once it's safer!
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: How's that for big news?
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: That's... that's pretty big.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: She mentioned you too, and said she knows you're starting a talent agency—and she'd join, if it takes off.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: My agency? To be an idol? The princess of the Nishigori clan?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Momoka, ssh!
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: If there's nothing else...
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: There's no rush.
Your work is consistent. More so than Mifune.
The Kinsekikai are under you now, but the Kinseki Group remains a hot potato with few willing to take over. Have you any interest in picking up his scraps and giving the Kinsekikai another chance?
No, sir.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Indeed, picking up his legacy is rather easy in theory, but who knows how many hardships stand in the way.
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: Do you intend to remain like this for the rest of your days? A gang leader for a group that has lost their home turf?
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: I'm just creating a home for people who fell off society's ladder and doing a bit of clean up work.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Besides, there is no way I can possibly drag this on forever, if Mitsukue no longer needs the Kinsekikai.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: I've had enough of both the Kinsekikai and the Kinseki Group.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: I came here today to not only fulfill Mifune-san's promise to you, but to also inform you...
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: I have tried my best to deal with the Kinsekikai's aftermath, and now I bid my farewell.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: You've made up your mind, so I won't insist on changing it.
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: Good.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Excuse me.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Alas. A beautiful face, but a heart icier than the fields of Ursus.
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: I was trying to be kind, but she just wouldn't appreciate it. How rare.
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: Forget it. Let's take a look at the goods.
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: The paunchy diet member stands up in the luxurious reception room and walks toward a small door at the back.
Shockingly, the room past the door holds no confidential documents or precious metals.
Bereft of even entertainment facilities, it merely looks like a simple, sloppy room of a local.
Other than the old pachinko machine in the center of the room.
Having escaped destruction in Kajimachi, it is now connected to a dedicated circuit, emitting light and distorted music.
The diet member, who appeared quite dignified earlier, is jumping at the chance to have a try at the machine.
He lifts a huge basket of pachinko balls from the ground. Right before he inserts them into the machine, a voice sounds from behind it.
Got your wish?
attributes.name: Voice of a Kami

attributes.content: Yes, yes. Kami-sama, thank you for your blessings! I am finally content!
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: Thank you for showing up at my humble home after so long!
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: You stayed with me for so many years, but suddenly vanished the other day, and I was so worried! I thought you had abandoned me! Ah, happy returns!
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: The kami swiftly pounces onto the top of the machine.
All that trouble just for this machine?
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: Sure enough! I mean, I wouldn't have achieved all this without this machine. All thanks to your blessings!
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: I don't remember ever blessing you with anything.
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: Even if you didn't help me in recent years, your aid from twenty years ago was enough for the rest of my life!
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: That again?
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: Indeed! The incident that turned me from a useless dreg into an impressive member of society!
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: I told you before, that had nothing to do with me either.
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: Hah, I don't believe you. Think about it, what sort of loser was I back then? A jobless hikkikomori unwilling to study or work... to borrow a trendy word of today—ah yes, a NEET.
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: Every day I begged my mother for coin to get a few pachinko rounds in. If I won, I'd consider myself lucky that day, or unlucky otherwise.
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: But that day, that day my destiny changed—I saw you on the streets.
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: I got nothing but wins that day. The pachinko balls flowed freely like water, and I even ran out of trays to carry them all!
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: And then?
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: Then?
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: Then I won a fortune 'big' enough to start a business on Nita Street. They were just pachinko balls after all. There was no way I could win more than the house.
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: But you showed up, and it proved to me... I was no longer a loser.
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: From that day on I believed strongly, I was blessed with fortune by you... looked after by a kami.
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: Had I not gotten blessed by you, how could I have won so much at pachinko, and used the earnings to speculate and profit till today?
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: I blessed you?
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: Of course!
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: The past few days, you were gone, yes? I went through so many hurdles!
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: I asked that Kinbee to bring me back my pachinko machine. A simple job, no?
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: But I couldn't give the order directly, so I said, take over Kajimachi, come up with a redevelopment plan, and bring back this pachinko machine on the way back, because I have ties to it.
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: And then everything went to shit. The Kajimachi gangs, the Lungmen cop, and even Kinbee's own artist... what a mess it was. The machine was almost lost to the chaos too.
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: Fuzakeru na, if something happened to this machine you blessed, then what point is there turning that piece of rotten land by the river into Mitsukue's commercial center?
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: It's not just me, but the whole of Mitsukue too... all of Southern Court is under your watch, which is why we're developing so fast and how our property prices are soaring, right?
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: The Northern Court bumpkins are scrunching up their faces in anger, but they can't do anything about the fact you don't want to go over there.
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: With you watching over us, we will surely improve, for...
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: A drop of sweat slides down his face. Not from nervousness, but his passion has gotten him heated up.
For... eternity!
attributes.name: Diet Member

attributes.content: And the kami looks down at him from the top of the machine...
Down at this secretly purchased thirty-floor high luxury apartment, with VIP-exclusive elevators...
Down at the almost hundred-meter high building, down at the clamor and chaos of Mitsukue...
And then It speaks a line It was tired of repeating, yet rarely taken seriously.
What does any of that have to do with me?
attributes.name: Kami of Happy Returns

attributes.content: The kami jumps out of the tiny room, but the diet member who finally succumbed to his want for a pachinko game does not notice Its exit.
He will never see the kami ever again after this day.
*sigh*
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: *sigh*
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: How long have they been talking?
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: Three hours at least, and there's no signs it's ending. Can I go to the bathroom real quick—
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: Don't even think about running away. You do know that you caused a huge commotion in Mitsukue, attracting two of the eight major family heads, and even nearly caused a dispute between the north and south, do you?
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: Forget about my old man, at least that old deer from the Kanou can't do anything to you. You're a priest, after all.
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: Even if you're not one of the Eight Great Clans, your bloodline's pretty—
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: Enough! You may no longer want to live, but you shouldn't drag your friends down with you!
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: You even sent them letters, saying you were planning to hide in Kusarikawa? They would've been in danger right now if you weren't here, *ahem*, performing dogeza.
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: Didn't you promise Momoka and the rest you'd risk your life to keep theirs safe? I'm sure you're a good man, so since you're so eager to help, I'm just going to the bathroom—
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: Enough praises. The Kanou and Nishigori heads will be out here soon, and it'll all be fine if you stay, but if you run... heh.
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: *sobs*...
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: *sigh*
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: Are you hungry? I have some chikuwa here, you can have them if you want.
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: Arigatou...
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: Um, kannushi-sama, I heard the shrine clergy mention you have a daughter?
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: Yes, I do. She's a little younger than you.
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: Are you as harsh with her as you were to me?
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: The priest is momentarily stunned, then looks at Sarasa as if she is a creature he cannot communicate with.
Me? Harsh with Lisa? What are you thinking?
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: I mean, didn't she run away like I did? I'm still in Higashi, but she ran all the way to Siracusa!
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: About that...
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: Ingrid can explain the whole thing to you if you meet her—
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: The door suddenly opens.
Fortunately, Sarasa noticed earlier the flickering light coming from the door gap, and returns to her dogeza pose right on time.
The priest immediately catches on, and straightens his back with head bowed, standing to the side.

Now then. Allow me to once again apologize to you and the Kanou clan on behalf of the Nishigori clan. We are extremely sorry for the trouble caused by our failure to discipline our younger generation.
attributes.name: Male Ægir

attributes.content: Please, there is no need to exaggerate. The important issues are all settled, and I would like to thank your daughter for providing this opportunity for us to hold this discussion in person.
attributes.name: Female Elafia

attributes.content: Mitsukue has an incompetent diet member who allows violent gangs to run rampant, and your daughter merely acted in the name of justice. What wrong has she committed?
attributes.name: Female Elafia

attributes.content: As for the kami's whereabouts... if I may be so bold, I believe it is best to leave them to appear on their own terms for now...
attributes.name: Female Elafia

attributes.content: The two clan leaders slowly stroll through the shrine's garden and towards the exit of the divine grounds, as if they have not noticed the two standing and kneeling behind them.
So... we're out of trouble?
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: Technically, yes—
attributes.name: Unruffled Priest

attributes.content: It's time to head home, Sarasa.
attributes.name: Male Ægir

attributes.content: The old Ægir casually calls out as he stands under the torii gate.
Sarasa freezes on the spot, her flushed cheeks from the joy of having gotten herself out of trouble turning pale.
She raises her head to look up at the little patch of sky encircled by the shrine, closes her eyes, and clenches her fists in a position where she believes her father cannot see...
Then, she puts on an obedient and emotionless expression as she follows her father's steps out of the shrine grounds.
